props.message:
LIRIEN'S CHAMBER

A hooded blue-curtained study high in a stone tower. Books on stars. A telescope angled at the south sky. The fire is laid but not lit.

No one here.

A journal lies open on the desk. The hand is small and steady:

'The boy is walking. He doesn't yet know which walk it is. The Sigil sits quiet in him — quieter than I have ever seen it sit in any of his line.

He will not need me until he needs me. Then he will need me very much.

— L.'

A telescope, dust-free, angled south. Beside it a slip of paper:

'I have watched the Murk for forty seasons. The pulses there have never once skipped. The realm endures.'

A row of books. The spines: 'Stars by Their Quiet Names', 'On the Slow Returning of Things Once Hoarded', 'A Walker's Manual for Small Mountains', 'The Triglyph and Its Patient Keeping'.

None of the books are dusty.

load_zones.prompt: [E] To the basket of sealed letters
